title: Opening for Production Engineer at Charak Pharma

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Charak Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
